reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the 1170 kHz AM station that Jim Angel presented the news for.
2. Using that station, determine its broadcast format.
original_final_question: What format does a 1170 kHz AM station that Jim Angel presented the news for have? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which Sydney radio station did Jim Angel present news for that broadcasts at 1170 kHz AM? Evidence: Jim Angel: James Bryson (Jim) Angel (1940 – 24 December 2007) was an Australian radio news presenter. During a career spanning more than four decades, he presented the news on Sydney radio stations 2SM, 2UE, 2GB and 2CH, and many affiliated radio stations around Australia. -> 2CH

Node 2: What format does 2CH broadcast? Evidence: 2CH: 2CH is a commercial radio station in Sydney, Australia, at 1170 kHz AM. It broadcasts an oldies format, and is aimed at an older age demographic. -> an oldies format
